title: Thomas Petzke
text: Home * People * Thomas Petzke Thomas Petzke [1] Thomas Petzke , a German computer scientist, IT architect , and as avocational chess programmer author of the chess engine mACE written in Free Pascal with an own GUI , and the UCI compliant chess engine iCE , written in C++ [2] . Thomas reports the development in his mACE and iCE blog [3] , and further maintains a chess programming site [4] .
